count_gate_6_3.branch: REDUCED (175<=n<300): power must be redone at achieved n BEFORE freeze

derangement_seed_families_declared.note: run-time seeds declared in registry/experiments/nsk1-r3.json; not used at build

deviation_disclosures.D-1_synthetic_templating: The design (ASM-2357) stipulates generator regeneration yields 'distributionally identical' fresh items. The AMT paraphrase templates (cleaned_placeholders.zip, sha256 pinned in the generator's main.py) are NO LONGER OBTAINABLE: canonical URL 404s, no Wayback snapshot, no public mirror found (2026-07-14). This build uses the pinned generator's SYNTHETIC templating branch (use_mturk_template=False; combination_length=1 forced by that branch): chain structure/genders/proof_state/query are from the identical pinned code, but story surfaces are the generator's built-in per-relation phrasings — terser and less varied than the AMT-paraphrase surfaces B'/B"/Stage-1 measured. REQUIRES designer adjudication BEFORE prereg-freeze.
deviation_disclosures.D-2_question_fallback_forced: All items use the fallback question template 'How is [A] related to [B]?' (released query order) to match 958/958 of the prior corpus (whose text_query was empty); the generator's synthetic text_query is preserved unused in provenance.
deviation_disclosures.D-3_csv_row_id_is_generation_index: The generator's per-puzzle uuid4 id is process-random (not seed-derived); provenance csv_row_id is the deterministic generation row index genrow-NNNNNN instead, keeping corpus bytes reproducible.

epistemic_status: MEASURED (provenance only) — every count below is a pure function of the pinned generator commit + seeds 20260720/20260726 under PYTHONHASHSEED=0; no experimental outcome is recorded here.

prior_recipe_carried_from.carried: S2 parse, S3 orientation self-check, S4 covered predicate, S6 story-byte dedup, S9.1/S9.2/S9.4 asserts, item/world schema
